name: S2E2 群星渡口
desc: 外援降临，平行宇宙世界杯，地理生物双副本。24 题炼狱级——每题皆陷阱、陷阱套陷阱，生词从简，胜负在脑。

m2: 太……以致不能（本身已含否定）
既不……也不……（谓语就近原则）
但愿……（与现在相反的虚拟语气）
使役动词 make 变被动后 to 要还原
m3: 发生（不及物动词，没有被动语态）
关系词：指物，或在从句中作宾语
关系词：指地点、在从句中作状语

m4.q: For three years, the Ye-Wang-She group ___ every challenger who dared to step forward.
ops: defeats
defeated
has defeated
had defeated
m4.why: for+时间段 + 持续影响到现在 = 现在完成时 has defeated。

m4.q: The moment Yue rushed in, a powerful spell ___ at her by the enemy.
ops: threw
was thrown
throws
has thrown
m4.why: 受动者 spell + 过去（the moment...rushed in）= was thrown。

m4.q: Just as Yue was about to give up, a stranger ___ — someone who did not belong to this world.
ops: appeared
appears
has appeared
was appearing
m4.why: 突然出现的瞬间动作，一般过去 appeared，呼应 was about to 的过去背景。

m4.q: The outsider, ___ face was hidden behind a mask, said nothing and simply raised one hand.
ops: who
whom
whose
which
m4.why: whose face = 外援的脸，所属格关系词。

m4.q: 【找出有语病的一处】 Messi is famous for (A) create wonderful chances; (B) known as the king, he makes moves that (C) seem impossible, and the crowd (D) loves every second.
ops: for create
known as the king
that seem impossible
the crowd loves
m4.why: 病句在 A：for 是介词，后接动名词：for creating。这是

ops: Lin couldn't understand why was the dungeon so quiet.
Lin couldn't understand why the dungeon was so quiet.
Lin couldn't understand why the dungeon is so quiet.
Lin couldn't understand that why the dungeon was so quiet.
m4.why: 陈述语序 + 主从时态一致（couldn't...was），正确。

m5.q: No one expected what ___ next — Yue fell, defeated.
ops: was happened
is happened
has been happened
happened
m5.why: what happened next 固定表达，主动过去时。

m5.q: "Yue ___ rushed in so fast," Mr. Wang sighed. "If she had waited, the outsider would have arrived in time."
ops: needn't have
shouldn't have
couldn't have
mustn't have
m5.why: shouldn't have rushed = 本不该（这么快）冲，对过去行为的责备与遗憾，呼应后句「若等一下就好了」。

m5.q: 【找出有语病的一处】 Haaland runs (A) faster than any other player, and his shots are (B) more powerful than a cannon; (C) neither the keeper nor the defenders (D) was ready for him.
ops: faster than any other player
more powerful than a cannon
neither the keeper nor the defenders
was ready
m5.why: 病句在 D：neither...nor 就近一致，就近的 defenders 是复数 → were ready。这是

m5.q: 【找出有语病的一处】 Everyone (A) watched Neymar (B) dancing past three players; that night, they saw the best move they (C) have ever known, and no one (D) could believe it.
ops: watched
dancing past
have ever known
could believe
m5.why: 病句在 C：过去框架(saw / that night)下，「曾见过的最…」用过去完成 had ever known；have 现在完成与过去时间冲突。

m5.q: 【找出有语病的一处】 (A) The number of fans (B) were growing every minute, all (C) shouting his name, and Ronaldo (D) raised his arms.
ops: The number of fans
were growing
shouting his name
raised his arms
m5.why: 病句在 B：the number of... 谓语用单数 was growing；were 错。

m5.q: 【找出有语病的一处】 The referee was (A) too surprised to not blow his whistle; the match was (B) so exciting that no one (C) could sit still, and even he (D) forgot the rules.
ops: too surprised to not blow
so exciting that
could sit still
forgot the rules
m5.why: 病句在 A：too surprised to blow = 惊讶得吹不了哨；多一个 not 逻辑全反。

m5.q: 【找出有语病的一处】 (A) The game were just beginning when, (B) cheered by millions, the four stars (C) walked onto the field (D) with the score still zero.
ops: The game were just beginning
cheered by millions
walked onto the field
with the score still zero
m5.why: 病句在 A：the game 单数主语 → was just beginning。

ops: The place that Lin entered was full of strange maps.
The place which Lin entered were full of strange maps.
The place where Lin entered was full of strange maps.
The place what Lin entered was full of strange maps.
m5.why: that Lin entered（that 作 entered 的宾语）+ was（the place 单数），全对。

ops: Hui must have been frightened by something inside.
Hui must have frightened by something inside.
Hui must has been frightened by something inside.
Hui must have been frighten by something inside.
m5.why: must have been frightened：情态完成式被动，「一定是被吓到了」，三段齐全。

ops: As soon as Lin will solve the puzzle, the door opened by itself.
No sooner Lin solved the puzzle than the door opened.
The moment when Lin solved the puzzle, the door opened.
As soon as Lin solved the puzzle, the door opened by itself.
m5.why: As soon as + 过去, 主句过去，正确。

ops: Xuan and Hui were tired of try again and again.
Xuan and Hui were tiring of trying again and again.
Xuan and Hui were tired of trying again and again.
Xuan and Hui were tired to trying again and again.
Hui wishes she can leave the dungeon right now.
Hui wishes she leaves the dungeon right now.
Hui wishes she will leave the dungeon right now.
Hui wishes she could leave the dungeon right now.
m5.why: wishes she could leave，虚拟语气正确。

ops: Tony: "Real exams are much more easier than Mr. Wang's papers."
Mia: "Compared with our training, the real exam was a piece of cake."
Leo: "The real exam wasn't as harder as the lessons we take."
Amy: "I finished the exam more quicklier than I expected."
m5.why: Compared with...引导 + a piece of cake 习语，整句无误。

ops: Ben: "Since I joined Mr. Wang's class, exams never scared me."
Eva: "Since joining the class for three years ago, exams are easy."
Sam: "Since I joined Mr. Wang's class, exams have never scared me."
Kim: "Since I have joined Mr. Wang's class, exams scared me no more."
m5.why: Since I joined..., exams have never scared me，主从时态标准搭配。

ops: Lily: "In class we are made think, not just remember."
Max: "In class we are make to think every lesson."
Joe: "In class we are made to think, not just to remember."
Nina: "In class we make to think every single lesson."
m5.why: are made to think：主动 make sb do 变被动后 to 还原，正确。

ops: Rob: "Mr. Wang is one of the teachers who makes us love English."
Sue: "Mr. Wang is the only one of the teachers who make learning fun."
Tim: "Mr. Wang is one of those teacher who make us think."
Pat: "Mr. Wang is one of the few teachers who make hard things simple."
m5.why: one of the few teachers who make，who 指复数 teachers → make，正确。

ops: Dan: "It is Mr. Wang's training what makes hard exams feel easy."
Cara: "It is Mr. Wang's training that makes hard exams feel easy."
Eli: "It is Mr. Wang's training makes hard exams feel easy."
Fay: "It Mr. Wang's training that makes hard exams feel easy."
m5.why: It is...training that makes...，强调主语的完整强调句。

m5.q: 【规则逆转 · 找出唯一有语法错误的一句】
ops: "This summer, the training will be harder than ever before."
"You will have more chances to go online and face real opponents."
"By the end of August, you will have met traps you never imagined."
"The mysterious helper have not decided which side to join."
m5.why: 病句在 D：The mysterious helper 单数主语 → has not decided；have 错。这是唯一错误句。
